title: Lydia
writer: Julien Duvivier, Leslie Bush-Fekete, Ben Hecht
actors: Merle Oberon, Joseph Cotten, Edna May Oliver
plot: Four friends reminisce in old age. Each of the men had been in love with the main character, Lydia. The interweaving stories reveal the reason why she never married any of them and, indeed, never married at all.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
